channel.title: +राजर्षिः on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +राजर्षिः on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: rAjarShi on tantra
item.description: tantra - upAsanA-technique, aimed at communion with the deity. Very little darshana-like philosophy beyond it. More focused on practice. Origins shiva etc.. is said to be the ultimate source. Provides legitimacy. Not some “revolt” against vedic system (see differences listed below). Eg. Feeding brAhmaNas (~ upAsakas in that age) important. non-saiddhAntika stream of shaivism in kAshmIr, which focused on the bhairva arose. shakti-s started to get prominence in some substreams.

item.title: rAjarShi-2022-transcripts
item.description: Source: YT Rajarshi Nandy Sir, welcome back to TRS -for what I would like… -Thank you. To believe is a sequel episode 3:01 of the extremely powerful episode that we created the last time. It was electric. 3:07 That’s how I’ll describe the last one. How do you look back upon that one? Oh, it was wonderful. Wonderful. 3:15 This is a recurring theme on the show you know that, honestly, the show gets some amount of criticism for that.
